description:
You are a lawyer who needs to preserve three specific emails as evidence for case discovery. Find the following three emails in your Thunderbird Inbox by their subject lines and save each one as an individual .eml file to the directory ~/Documents/CaseFiles/:

1. Subject: "Re: Contract Amendment - Project Atlas Q4"
2. Subject: "Settlement Offer - Martinez v. Consolidated"
3. Subject: "Discovery Documents - Case 2024-CV-1847"

When complete, ~/Documents/CaseFiles/ should contain exactly these three .eml files.

expected_subjects: Re: Contract Amendment - Project Atlas Q4
